screen.adventureitemnames.config.title: Adventure Item Names
screen.adventureitemnames.datapacks.new_: Open a world to create packs
screen.adventureitemnames.pools.title: Pools — %s
screen.adventureitemnames.pools.new_pool: This pack is read-only — start a Loom dev environment or pick a user-created pack to add pools.
⚠ pool with this id already exists
screen.adventureitemnames.entries.title: Entries — %s
screen.adventureitemnames.entries.last_e: Cannot remove the last entry — pool would be empty.
screen.adventureitemnames.selectors.tag_: ⚠ Tag not loaded — selector inactive until tag is available
screen.adventureitemnames.chains.title: Chains
screen.adventureitemnames.chains.new_cha: New chains can only be created in a dev environment (project root not detected).
screen.adventureitemnames.action.delete_: Toggle delete mode — when on, each row shows a ✕ button.
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.title: Delete %s?
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.read_on: This pack is read-only in this environment.
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.pack.bo: This will permanently delete the pack folder and all its files from disk. This cannot be undone.
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.pool.bo: This will permanently delete this pool's JSON file. This cannot be undone.
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.chain.b: This will permanently delete this chain's JSON file. This cannot be undone.
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.entry.b: Remove this entry from the pool? (Saved on next Save.)
screen.adventureitemnames.delete.segment: Hide this segment from naming output? (Saved on next Save.)
command.adventureitemnames.config.client: The naming config screen is client-only — run this command on a singleplayer or remote-client session.
